results.title: Indian Mobility Shifting Gears, Non-Metro India, And EVs Drive Motor Insurance Growth
results.description: The overall demand for motor insurance from Tier 2 and Tier 3 cities grew 15 per cent in FY2026, surpassing metros’ steady 8 per cent growth YoY. Telangana is on top with 30 per cent YoY growth in car insurance adoption, and Maharashtra registered the highest growth in EV insurance

results.title: MACL Advises Passengers to Arrive Early During Eid Holiday Rush
results.description: Maldives Airports Company Limited has advised passengers departing from Velana International Airport to arrive well ahead

results.title: PM MODI ROZJAR MELA
results.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi said that all the recruited youths are becoming key partners in the country's journey of development.

results.title: Marco Rubio unveils ‘America First’ visa plan in India for business travel
results.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio unveiled a new "America First" visa schedule prioritizing business professionals to strengthen economic and strategic ties. Speaking at the US Embassy Support Annex Building dedication, Rubio highlighted the facility's role in improving visa operations and supporting diplomatic staff. The new building is expected to enhance efficiency and reduce operational costs for the mission.

results.title: Indian billionaire and his Bollywood star wife 'buy up five flats in Notting Hill block to turn into servants' quarters for their £21million mansion - and threaten to turn them into social housing if neighbours complain'
results.description: When, three years ago, a billionaire Indian clothing tycoon and his glamorous Bollywood actress wife bought a mansion in need of some TLC for £21 million, it barely caused a ripple of interest.
